raw_consumer_statement:
In XXXX of 2023, I noticed XXXX fraud charges on my account. XXXX was reversed immediately, and the other still shows on my account. I have disputed the charge, and they sent me a new card. They told me that they were investigating the charge. In XXXX of 2023, the charge was removed, only to be put back on a week later. They have told me not to pay the balance as it will be removed. I have talked with multiple people with Citi, and they all said it will be removed. It is still there and now has interest and late fees attached. I called today and was again given the runaround about this and told that the department that handles this ( the XXXX Department ) is unavailable. I do not have any faith that they are going to fix this, so now I am turning to here for help.
